name: Automate Gmail Inbox Organization with AI Categorization
description: Searches recent Gmail messages, uses Claude AI to categorize each email (Work, Shopping, Newsletter, Personal, etc.), applies Gmail labels based on category, and posts an organization summary to Slack.

source.originalName: Automate Gmail inbox organization with rule-based categorization and smart actions

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing messages

gmailSendKey.description: Gmail connection key for modifying messages (labels)

searchQuery.description: Gmail search query for messages to organize

steps.name: Compile email list for AI categorization
Build Claude prompt for email categorization
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build Slack summary of inbox organization
